results.title: Two Sum - Leetcode 1 - HashMap - Python
results.reason: Widely considered the gold standard for this specific problem; comments consistently praise the 'why' behind the HashMap approach.
summary: Find two numbers that add to a target
Use a hash map to store seen numbers
Check if the needed value is already stored
Solve the problem in one pass through data

results.title: LeetCode Question with Solution | Two Sum Problem | Placement Series
results.reason: Highly rated for beginners; Jenny is known for breaking down logic step-by-step for students.
summary: Understand the basic logic of the problem
Compare every pair of numbers to find sums
Learn how to optimize the slow approach
Write clear code to return the correct indices

results.title: LeetCode Exercise in Java Tutorial - Two Sum FAST Solution
results.reason: Excellent Java-specific walkthrough that explains the logic clearly for those not using Python.
summary: Solve the challenge using the Java language
Improve speed by avoiding nested loops
Handle edge cases and potential input errors
Test the code against different sets of numbers

results.title: Data Structure and Algorithm Patterns for LeetCode Interviews – Tutorial
results.reason: Comprehensive and highly respected, but the 75-minute length may be overwhelming for a beginner seeking a single problem solution.
summary: Identify common patterns used in coding interviews
Learn when to use specific data structures
Master techniques like sliding windows and pointers
Apply these strategies to many different problems

results.title: 3Sum - Leetcode 15 - Python
results.reason: Excellent teaching quality, but covers '3Sum' which is a more advanced variation unsuitable for a 'Two Sum' beginner.
summary: Find three numbers that sum to zero
Sort the list to make searching easier
Use two pointers to scan the array
Avoid duplicate answers in the final result
